modules.name: Introduction to Enterprise Desktop Environment
modules.description: Overview of enterprise desktop environments, Windows editions comparison, lifecycle management, and the role of centralized IT management.

lessons.title: Introduction to Enterprise Desktop Environment
topics: Windows editions: Home, Pro, Enterprise, Education
Security, identity, and compliance in enterprise environments

modules.name: Identity Management with Microsoft Entra ID
modules.description: Cloud-native identity management using Microsoft Entra ID, including user and group management, role-based access control, MFA, and Conditional Access.

lessons.title: Identity Management with Microsoft Entra ID
topics: Entra ID vs. on-premises Active Directory
Users, groups, and role-based access control (RBAC)
OAuth2, SAML, and modern authentication protocols

modules.name: Device Enrollment and Authentication
modules.description: Device onboarding using Microsoft Intune and Configuration Manager, enrollment methods, authentication flows, and compliance checks.

lessons.title: Device Enrollment and Authentication
topics: Device lifecycle: enrollment, configuration, compliance, retirement
BYOD and corporate device enrollment strategies
Authentication flows and Conditional Access integration

modules.name: Configuration and User Profile Management
modules.description: Creating and deploying device and user configuration profiles in Intune, managing user experience settings, and profile troubleshooting.

lessons.title: Configuration and User Profile Management
topics: User experience settings and profile redirection

modules.name: Application Deployment and Management
modules.description: Deploying Win32 apps, Microsoft 365, and LOB applications through Intune, plus Mobile Application Management (MAM) for BYOD.

lessons.title: Application Deployment and Management
topics: App types: Win32, MSI, Store, web, LOB
Win32 Content Prep Tool for packaging
App lifecycle: deploy, update, monitor, retire

modules.name: Device Compliance and Protection
modules.description: Building and enforcing compliance policies, Conditional Access integration, encryption, and endpoint protection strategies.

lessons.title: Device Compliance and Protection
topics: Compliance policies: OS version, encryption, password, threat level

modules.name: Defender Security Integration
modules.description: Integrating Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, Defender Antivirus, and Defender for Cloud Apps with Intune for unified threat management.

lessons.title: Defender Security Integration
topics: Device onboarding to Defender via Intune
Defender Antivirus configuration and real-time protection
Defender for Cloud Apps and shadow IT discovery
Microsoft 365 Defender portal: incidents and automated investigation

modules.name: Deployment Strategies and Tools
modules.description: Enterprise device deployment using MDT, Configuration Manager, Windows Autopilot, and dynamic provisioning for large-scale rollouts.

lessons.title: Deployment Strategies and Tools
topics: Deployment lifecycle: planning, imaging, configuration, post-deployment
Microsoft Deployment Toolkit (MDT) and task sequences

modules.name: Transition to Modern Endpoint Management
modules.description: Migrating from traditional on-premises management to cloud-native strategies using co-management, Intune, and Endpoint Analytics.

lessons.title: Transition to Modern Endpoint Management
topics: Drivers for modernization: remote work, cost, scalability

modules.name: Cloud-Based Desktop Management
modules.description: Windows 365 Cloud PCs and Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) for delivering secure, managed desktops from the cloud.

lessons.title: Cloud-Based Desktop Management
topics: Conditional Access and security for cloud desktops

modules.name: Capstone Lab & Review
modules.description: Comprehensive capstone lab integrating all course concepts into a real-world endpoint management scenario.

assessment.title: Microsoft 365 Endpoint Administrator Assessment
items: Quiz: Introduction to Enterprise Desktop Environment
Quiz: Identity Management with Microsoft Entra ID
Quiz: Configuration and User Profile Management
Quiz: Transition to Modern Endpoint Management
